ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the term (e.g., Fall Semester 2005) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the term */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of registration for the term */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date of registration for the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject abbreviation (e.g., CS for Computer Science) */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this section belongs to */,
  "section_number" INTEGER /* Section number */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., Lecture, Lab) */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "maximum_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed to enroll */,
  "actual_enrollment" INTEGER /* Actual number of students enrolled */,
  "room_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room where the section meets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the section */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course-instructor relationship */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section this schedule belongs to */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the section meets */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the section */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the section */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the section meets */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the section meets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this resource is associated with */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Textbook, Online Article) */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the feedback is about */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course this announcement is related to */,
  "announcement_title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "announcement_content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_announcements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degrees" (
  "degree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree (e.g., Bachelor of Science) */,
  "degree_date" TEXT /* Date the degree was conferred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_degrees_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
